title: 无标题文章
summary: We just released Mastodon 4.5.6, 4.4.13, and 4.3.19. These versions contain various bug fixes, including a fix for a moderate security vulnerability. Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page. https:// github.com/mastodon/mastodon/r eleases # MastodonAdmin
content:
We just released Mastodon 4.5.6, 4.4.13, and 4.3.19.

These versions contain various bug fixes, including a fix for a moderate security vulnerability.

Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page.

https://github.com/mastodon/mastodon/releases

#MastodonAdmin
